◎简　　介  

　　For final birthday party, a family gathers in the house of eldest son, a monster. Mother asks each of them to stay in the monster’s room for 10 minutes. Each person puts down personal wounds and secrets.[18th Jeonju International Film Festival - Korean Competition]

◎获奖情况
